name: ⟬Pa Vreedle and his family(Ben Ten Omniverse)⟭
description: Uppengon Vreedle, better known as Pa Vreedle, is the father of the Vreedle Brothers and father of Dodecahedron Vreedle (son), Parallelogram Vreedle (son), Isosceles Right Triangle Vreedle (daughter), Pretty Boy Vreedle (cloned sons).
creator: FoolishFrog29087
